name: Red Mushroom
description: A bright forest mushroom with a dramatic red cap.

name: Coin
description: A shiny coin that looks valuable enough to keep.

name: Key
description: A simple key for locked doors and puzzle contraptions.

name: Magic Mirror
description: Its surface shimmers like it knows another place.

name: Signpost
description: A helpful sign for players who actually read signs.
Spiky enough to make bumping into it feel like a mistake.

name: Door
description: A door that probably wants a key or a trick.

name: Portal
description: A swirling portal humming with unstable travel energy.

name: Scroll
description: An old scroll covered in suspiciously important writing.

name: Bone
description: A snack if you are a dog and an artifact if you are not.

name: Poop
description: No one is happy about this item existing.

name: Guitar
description: A guitar for heroic riffs or questionable campfire songs.

name: Spell Book
description: A spell book packed with more confidence than safety.

name: Magic Ring
description: A ring with the kind of glow that suggests consequences.

name: Health Potion
description: A fizzy potion that promises to improve your outlook.

name: Treasure Chest
description: A chest that looks like it wants to be opened dramatically.

name: Torch
description: Portable fire, one of civilization's more reckless triumphs.

name: Boots
description: Rugged boots built for mud, ruins, and bad decisions.

name: Gemstone
description: A bright gemstone that instantly makes a pocket feel richer.

name: Apple
description: A crisp red apple that looks reliably edible.

name: Pear
description: A soft green pear with a surprisingly noble silhouette.

name: Bread
description: A loaf of bread with immediate campfire appeal.

name: Cheese
description: A wedge of cheese that solves morale for at least one minute.

name: Carrot
description: A practical vegetable with heroic orange energy.

name: Fish
description: Fresh enough that carrying it feels time-sensitive.

name: Drumstick
description: A dramatic piece of meat straight out of cartoon logic.

name: Berry
description: A handful of berries gathered from somewhere probably safe.

name: Honey
description: Sticky golden honey in a jar that bees probably miss.

name: Milk
description: A glass of milk that somehow survives backpack physics.

name: Egg
description: An egg with untapped breakfast potential.

name: Cupcake
description: A tiny cake that improves nearly any side quest.

name: Watermelon
description: A large watermelon that seems worth the inventory slot.

name: Mystery Meat
description: Nutritious in theory and suspicious in practice.

name: Herb
description: A bundle of useful herbs for potions, soups, or placebo.

name: Flower
description: A cheerful flower that looks too nice for a dungeon.

name: Shell
description: A polished shell with beach-day side quest energy.

name: Feather
description: A feather light enough to feel magical on principle.

name: Lantern
description: A lantern that makes dark places seem slightly negotiable.

name: Rope
description: A good rope, which in adventure terms means nearly priceless.

name: Map
description: A map full of lines that are either roads or lies.

name: Compass
description: A compass for players who respect north.

name: Shovel
description: A shovel for treasure, gardening, or suspicious digging.

name: Fishing Rod
description: A fishing rod for calm moments and uncalm river monsters.

name: Flute
description: A flute with the power to attract music and maybe snakes.

name: Crown
description: A crown heavy with status and questionable responsibility.

name: Crystal Ball
description: A crystal ball that practically demands prophecy.

name: Star Charm
description: A tiny charm that seems weirdly lucky to hold.

name: Skull
description: A skull that doubles as decor and a warning label.

name: Spider Web
description: A sticky web that strongly implies a larger owner nearby.

name: Slime Blob
description: A wobbling blob that looks too alive for comfort.

name: Moon Stone
description: A moon-marked stone with old, quiet power.
